northStar.name: Personal Map Masthead
northStar.summary: A warm, photo-led editorial index that connects Shaun's consulting work, stories, and personal background.

visualProbeDecision.chosenDirection: Hybrid of Field Notes Masthead and Personal Map
carryForward: Consulting proof follows the hero without an extra start-here index
Consulting proof uses services, industries, and quotes rather than equal card grids
Latest stories appear as editorial entries
Warm paper, teal, clay, and olive accents

rules.firstViewport: Show Shaun/personality and hint at the next section on mobile and desktop.
rules.readFirst: Article pages prioritize comfortable reading measure and working audio/category/tag UI.
rules.proof: Consulting proof should feel specific and editorial, not like a generic service-card grid.
rules.antiPattern: No Consulting + personal writing bubble, no repeated two-column homepage rhythm, no SaaS consultant template.
